response:
Upstairs the publisher loves brain teasers. The editor compiles a book with 3 sections. Each section has a different number of puzzles.  
* * *  
The first section has 12 puzzles. The second section has twice as many puzzles. The third section has 5 more puzzles.  
* * *  
The total number of puzzles is 53. The entire book contains 53 puzzles. Any other questions?
